title: Calibrated Radiocarbon Ages — CalibratedAges-class
text: S4 class represent calibrated radiocarbon ages.

title: Calibrated Radiocarbon Ages — CalibratedAges-class
text: labels character vector specifying names ages (e.g. laboratory codes). ages numeric vector giving BP ages calibrated. errors numeric vector giving standard deviation ages calibrated. curves character vector specifying calibration curves used.

title: Calibrated Radiocarbon Ages — CalibratedAges-class
text: start length-one numeric vector specifying beginning calibrated time range. resolution length-one numeric vector specifying resolution calibrated time range. F14C logical scalar: status integer vector specifying calibration status. must one "0" (OK), "1" (calibration range) "2" (may extend calibration range).

title: Calibrated SPD — CalibratedSPD-class
text: S4 class represent summed probability distributions (SPD) radiocarbon dates.

title: Calibrated SPD — CalibratedSPD-class
text: start length-one numeric vector specifying beginning calibrated time range. resolution length-one numeric vector specifying resolution calibrated time range.

BP years. length-one numeric vector specifying latest data calibrate , cal.
